title: Focus session can be started with a selected duration
description: Verifies a user can select a valid duration and start a deep work session with an active countdown.

steps.description: Navigate to /focus
Select a 45-minute session duration
Start a Deep Work session
Verify the session is running and the countdown timer is active

title: Home dashboard shows key overview widgets
description: Verifies the Home Dashboard loads and displays the NeuroScore visualization, core stat cards, and the One Thing section for daily orientation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the NeuroScore visualization is displayed
Verify the stat cards and the One Thing section are displayed

title: Home quick action navigates to Focus module
description: Verifies a user can use a Home quick action to reach the Focus Shield page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the quick action to open the Focus module
Verify the user lands on the Focus Shield page

title: Focus countdown decreases over time while session is active
description: Verifies the countdown timer visibly decreases after a deep work session starts.

steps.description: Navigate to /focus
Select a 25-minute session duration
Start a Deep Work session
Wait for 3 seconds
Verify the remaining time has decreased since the session started

title: Home supports the daily-start journey into a deep work session
description: Verifies a user can go from Home to Focus via quick action and start a 25-minute session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the quick action to open the Focus module
Select a 25-minute session duration
Start a Deep Work session
Verify the session is running and the countdown timer is active

title: Clarity engine decomposes a problem into prioritized task cards
description: Verifies submitting a problem produces task cards with priority labeling and context for urgency and impact.

steps.description: Navigate to /clarity
Fill a concise problem description into the problem input area
Submit the problem for decomposition
Verify generated task cards are displayed
Verify task cards show priority labeling and urgency/impact context

title: Toggle a habit completion updates daily progress and streak visibility
description: This test verifies a user can load habits, toggle one habit as complete for today, and see the daily completion progress update with streak information still visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /habits
Wait for the habits list to load
Toggle a habit's completion for today
Verify the daily completion progress indicator updates to reflect the new completion state
Verify a streak count is visible for the toggled habit

title: Submit evening reflection and view Truth Report
description: This test verifies a user can complete mood/productivity scores and the three prompts, submit the reflection, and see a Truth Report displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /reflect
Select a valid mood score
Select a valid productivity score
Fill in reflective text into the what-went-well field
Fill in reflective text into the what-distracted-you field
Fill in reflective text into the what-will-you-change-tomorrow field
Submit the reflection
Verify a Truth Report insight is displayed

title: Habit completion persists after page reload
description: This test verifies that marking a habit complete for today persists after refreshing the page and the habit remains completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /habits
Wait for the habits list to load
Toggle a habit's completion for today
Reload the page
Wait for the habits list to load
Verify the previously toggled habit still shows as completed for today

title: Clarity provides a single next action recommendation
description: Verifies requesting an immediate next action returns exactly one actionable suggestion.

steps.description: Navigate to /clarity
Fill a concise problem description into the problem input area
Submit the problem for decomposition
Request an immediate what-to-do-right-now suggestion
Verify a single next action recommendation is displayed

title: Clarity tasks support step completion via checkbox interaction
description: Verifies a user can check off a step within a generated task and the step shows as completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /clarity
Fill a concise problem description into the problem input area
Submit the problem for decomposition
Check off one step within a generated task
Verify the selected step is shown as completed

title: Log today in an active challenge to advance progress
description: Verifies the user can log today for an active challenge and the progress indicator updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /challenges
Select the Active filter
If no active challenge is listed, select the Available filter and start a challenge
Select the Active filter
Log today for an active challenge
Verify the active challenge shows increased progress for today

title: Focus intervention protocol increases resisted counter when staying strong
description: Verifies triggering the temptation intervention and choosing to stay strong increments the resisted distractions count without ending the session.

steps.description: Navigate to /focus
Select a 25-minute session duration
Start a Deep Work session
Trigger the temptation intervention
Wait for the intervention countdown to finish
Choose the option indicating the user stayed strong
Verify the distractions resisted counter has increased

title: Start an available challenge to begin a program
description: Verifies the user can start a challenge from the Available filter and the challenge becomes active with progress UI visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /challenges
Select the Available filter
Start a challenge from the list
Select the Active filter
Verify the started challenge appears under Active challenges

title: Expand a habit to view 4 Laws details
description: This test verifies a user can expand a habit card and view its Cue, Craving, Response, and Reward details.

steps.description: Navigate to /habits
Wait for the habits list to load
Click a habit card to expand it
Verify the habit shows its Cue, Craving, Response, and Reward details

title: Home dashboard remains usable after navigating away and back
description: Verifies returning to Home from another module still shows the NeuroScore visualization and core stats.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the quick action to open the Focus module
Click the navigation control to return to the Home Dashboard
Verify the NeuroScore visualization is displayed
Verify the stat cards are displayed

title: Request Teach Back feedback for a book principle
description: This test verifies a user can request a Teach Back assessment for a selected book content and receive feedback displayed in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /wisdom
Wait for the book library to load
Click a book card to expand it
Request a Teach Back assessment
Verify Teach Back feedback is displayed

title: Focus intervention protocol handles giving in without breaking session state
description: Verifies choosing the option indicating the user gave in does not break the active session state and the countdown continues.

steps.description: Navigate to /focus
Select a 25-minute session duration
Start a Deep Work session
Trigger the temptation intervention
Wait for the intervention countdown to finish
Choose the option indicating the user gave in
Verify the deep work session remains active and the countdown timer is still running

title: Daily progress reflects multiple completions
description: This test verifies that toggling multiple habits updates the daily completion progress to reflect additional completed habits.

steps.description: Navigate to /habits
Wait for the habits list to load
Toggle a first habit's completion for today
Toggle a second habit's completion for today
Verify the daily completion progress indicator reflects a higher completion rate than after only one habit was completed

title: Expand a book to read principles and applications
description: This test verifies a user can expand a book card and view its principles and application suggestions.

steps.description: Navigate to /wisdom
Wait for the book library to load
Click a book card to expand it
Verify the expanded book shows principle content and application suggestions

title: Filter challenges by status to find relevant programs
description: Verifies the user can switch between status filters and see the challenge list update to match the selected filter.

steps.description: Navigate to /challenges
Select the Available filter
Select the Active filter
Select the Completed filter
Select the All filter
Verify the challenge list updates when switching filters

title: Clarity prevents submission with an empty problem description
description: Verifies the user cannot decompose an empty problem and receives a validation cue.

steps.description: Navigate to /clarity
Submit the problem for decomposition without entering a description
Verify an input validation error is visible

title: Reflection requires mood and productivity selection before submit
description: This test verifies the reflection cannot be submitted without selecting both mood and productivity and a validation indication is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /reflect
Fill in reflective text into the what-went-well field
Fill in reflective text into the what-distracted-you field
Fill in reflective text into the what-will-you-change-tomorrow field
Submit the reflection
Verify a validation error is visible indicating required scores must be selected

title: Home shows a time-of-day greeting
description: Verifies the Home Dashboard shows a greeting appropriate to the time of day.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify a time-of-day greeting is displayed

title: Reflection requires all three prompt answers before submit
description: This test verifies the reflection cannot be submitted when a prompt answer is missing and the user is shown a validation indication.

steps.description: Navigate to /reflect
Select a valid mood score
Select a valid productivity score
Fill in reflective text into the what-went-well field
Fill in reflective text into the what-distracted-you field
Leave the what-will-you-change-tomorrow field empty
Submit the reflection
Verify a validation error is visible indicating all reflection prompts must be completed

title: Clarity handles long problem input without breaking task display
description: Verifies a long problem description can be submitted and resulting task cards remain readable on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /clarity
Fill a long multi-sentence problem description into the problem input area
Submit the problem for decomposition
Verify generated task cards are displayed

title: View challenge cards with difficulty and progress information
description: Verifies challenge cards display key metadata (difficulty and progress) so the user can compare programs.

steps.description: Navigate to /challenges
Select the All filter
Verify challenge cards display a difficulty indicator and a progress indicator

title: Progress is not persisted after page reload
description: Verifies that after logging today and reloading the page, the challenge progress resets as expected for non-persisted challenge tracking.

steps.description: Navigate to /challenges
Select the Active filter
If no active challenge is listed, select the Available filter and start a challenge
Select the Active filter
Log today for an active challenge
Navigate to /challenges
Select the Active filter
Verify the challenge does not retain the logged progress after reload

title: New Habit control does not break the page
description: This test verifies that interacting with the New Habit control does not crash or navigate away and the habits list remains usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /habits
Wait for the habits list to load
Click the control to create a new habit
Verify the habits page remains interactive and the habits list is still displayed
